【now.com體育】雲加縱橫英超20年，不要看其常穿著整齊西裝，一副斯文教授的模樣，在場邊動口兼動手的案例不少，又何止周日推第4球證安東尼泰萊一單，就讓大家回顧一下這位阿仙奴老帥昔日的動氣實錄。 撰文：盧卡東尼

1. 雲加 vs 祖爾（2006年）
簡評：這場在酋長球場上演的北倫敦打吡，雲加不滿熱刺前鋒羅比堅尼入球前，己隊已有兩名球員受傷倒地，卻沒有吹罰，因此與球證投訴，也激發他與祖爾之間出現口角，並且差點頭撼頭，幸有第4球證在中間阻隔，兩人沒有發生進一步「講手」場面，事後也沒有被秋後算帳。
相關片段：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bzsOq3CM5qY

2. 雲加 vs 柏祖（2006年）
簡評：相比祖爾，雲加對當時執教韋斯咸的柏祖便沒有這麼客氣。這場在烏普頓公園上演的英超比賽，主隊完場前兩分鐘由希活打破僵局致勝，柏祖當時在場邊慶祝過激，引起雲加不滿，兩人繼而出現口角，教授更用手將對方推開，並準備衝前再理論，同樣由第4球證隔開及好言相勸後，才恢復冷靜。事後，教授遭英足總罰款，柏祖卻沒有。
相關片段：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L0SGosF-Hhg

3. 雲加 vs 膠樽（2009年）
簡評：這場在奧脫福上演的聯賽，對手不是費格遜，而是膠樽。當尹佩斯的入球被判越位後，雲加非常憤怒，怒踢在草地上的膠樽洩忿，在膠樽飛起不久後，便被球證甸恩趕上看台，及後他站在看台上被一群曼聯球迷包圍的情形，堪稱經典。足總賽後不但沒有處分他，還向他道歉，皆因當日看台上沒有空出的座位，要雲加全程罰企。
相關片段：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DCYOcETY5sM

4. 雲加 vs 杜格利殊（2011年）
簡評：這場對利物浦的比賽，雲加在比賽尾段與杜格利殊起爭執，但兩人只是動口，沒有動手。事緣紅軍博得12碼，雲加不滿，與杜Sir怒目相對，兩人均攤開雙手，但後者看來比較激氣，叫教授閉嘴。兩人事後都沒有受罰。
相關片段：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8WQH-bBu2ug

5. 雲加 vs 摩連奴（2014年）
簡評：這一幕大家都不會忘記，2014/15球季在史丹福橋的賽事。雲加不滿加利卡希爾侵犯阿歷斯山齊士，向場邊的摩連奴發難，雙手推開這位死對頭，而且十分進取，一副已準備好「開拖」的格局，英足總最後網開一面，沒有對兩人採取紀律行動。
相關片段：
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LgwjM-Kd7GU

租女友過年最貴日薪3000　見親友幫手做家務　律師指「僱傭關係」應受法律保障

新年將至，租女友回家過年又成熱門話題，社交網站上有不少相關帖文，當中不乏女網友「待出租」的帖文，也有一些網站的宣傳廣告，百度的「出租吧」中，出租的價格由100元至3000元不等。

「北京青年報」報道，來自江蘇的陳先生有租女友回家的打算，他指自己雖然剛畢業，但家中已催婚，故選擇在百度貼吧發布徵求女友信息，並開出一日2000元的價格，預計過年期間會租女友3至5日。

陳先生透露，租來的女友需陪他見親友，也要幫忙做點家務。暫時已有10多人聯絡陳先生，不過他還未找到適合的「女友」，「沒什麼具體要求，正常些就行。」也有男士不租女友，反而想把自己出租，劉先生就以每日100元的價格，當「出租男友」，他希望大家過年能過得開心，只要提前溝通好，相信沒有大問題。

除了在社交平台發帖，網上也有不少專營出租男、女友的平台，這些網站提供待租男、女友的簡介、求租論壇，有些網站還設有「租得成」保證。北京青年報記者以顧客身分，向其中一個網站查詢，他被告知，過年期間出租女友的價格為每日1500元，還需負擔女方出租期間的交通費用及開銷等，另外，顧客亦需向專營網站付每日150元作「佣金」。

該網站的客戶服務員又表示，主要根據顧客的職業和身高去找，也可以先看照片，出租女友可與客戶同住一室，但不能同牀，可以讓女生「打地舖」，如不小心被家人發現，可以退還一半款項，又指他們介紹的都是熟手，很會哄老人家，察言觀色。

對於出租男、女友的行為，網友反應兩極，有人認為這是欺騙父母的不道德行為，也有人覺得這是白色謊言，令父母開心也是孝順。北京京都律師事務所的律師常莎認為，「租人」實質上是一種僱傭關係，在不違法的強制性或禁止性規定，且內容符合公序良俗的情況下，租人合同應受法律保護，出租平台亦應做好中介服務角色，在承擔用戶身分審查、個人信息保護、發現非法行為及時阻止等三方面做好監管。

有雲加有入球

雲格是英超茶餐廳的熟客，餐牌都不用望，還未坐下就叫道：「麻煩一個四號餐，啡走！」旁邊的普捷天奴奇道：「你又吃四號餐，不會悶嗎？」雲格擺出懶理他的樣子，回應道：「我昨晚也是叫了四號。」


雲格：「唔該，四號！」

高路普大力拍向雲格，哈哈大笑道：「你兩個別鬥嘴吧，昨晚過得開心嗎？我就爽了，快上快落，連眼鏡都跌爛，充滿激情。我今早起身時，腰骨還有點痛。」

「後生仔！」雲格像智者般道：「只知快，不懂享受，果然是年輕人。別說我不教你，你次次都那麼快，很難捱到季尾。」高路普挺起胸膛道：「年輕就是我的本錢！」

雲格道：「憑我多年經驗，我擅於掌握時機，每次我都用盡每分每秒，到八十甚至九十分鐘才嘿嘿。」旁邊的摩連奴說：「我懂你的玩法，張智霖都說過，就是圍住搓來搓去都不入去。」


雲格沒有說謊，他的阿仙奴是今季英超80分鐘後入球能力最強的球隊。

A steward (not the same one who stepped between the manager the fourth official), came in asking us to clear the room with a silently fuming Arsene Wenger right behind him.

It appears, after the pictures we saw of Wenger being sent off and then appearing to push Anthony Taylor, he headed (or was taken) to the first place he could find to watch the end of the game. Which turned out to be with us.

We didn't leave. You can't do an interview if you haven't seen the whole game and, to be fair, although the steward had, Wenger never asked us to.

And so myself, the cameraman Graham and the sound man Neil were in a small (maybe 8ft by 4ft) room with the Arsenal manager watching what would surely have been the end of their title challenge.

It was awkward. None of us in the Sky crew spoke - we had our jobs to do and, to be honest, Arsene didn't seem in the mood for small talk.

He paced around what little space he had in the tight room, occasionally chuntering.

And then he said, 'Penalty!' Ben Mee's challenge on Laurent Koscielny had just unfolded on the monitor in front of us.

‘Money and class’ can lure much wanted Bundesliga midfielder to sign for Arsenal

Schalke currently find themselves 10th in the Bundesliga, which means their likelihood of European football next season isn’t great. It could be worse, Schalke’s losing streak at the beginning of the season had them firmly rooted to the bottom of the table, and the club was in crisis mode.

German newspaper Bild ponder that the lack of European football could nudge Leon Goretzka towards the exit. The player’s contract ends in June 2018, and Bild believe that without Europa League qualification it will be harder to get a renewal.

That then leads to possible suitors, with Arsenal and Juventus named. The German newspaper explain that ‘money and class’ can lure Goretzka to both of those clubs, which is quite complimentary.

Rather than just sneering at the Premier League’s money, Bild recognise Arsenal are a huge pull without that, and in the premier group of European clubs.

Right now there doesn’t seem to be much in this other than Bild pondering and picking out Arsenal and Juventus, but if there’s no contract renewal by the summer then rumours around the 21 year old midfielder will grow.

As well as the money and class, Arsenal have their own little Germany contingent consisting of Per Mertesacker, Mesut Ozil and Shkodran Mustafi.

Leon Goretzka has repeatedly been linked with interest from around Europe but there doesn’t appear to be anything concrete yet.

Ben Sheaf has signed a contract extension with Arsenal, and, given how highly the youngster is rated at the club and Arsene Wenger in particular, the news comes as little surprise. 

Sheaf joined Arsenal in 2014 from West Ham United’s renowned academy as a central midfielder, with his excellent passing ability in evidence straight away. 

The prospect was initially involved with the U18 side and impressed in some fixtures while finding matters considerably more challenging in others. 

Last season, however, Sheaf really came to the fore as he stepped up to the U23 side and was also named on the bench for the League Cup fixture away to Sheffield Wednesday – the first real indication of Wenger showing faith in him. 

Sheaf didn’t get onto the pitch on that occasion but the experience appeared to provide him with a confidence boost and he went on to produce some stellar performances for the U23s, mainly as a defensive midfielder but also occasionally at right-back. 

This campaign has seen Sheaf rise to an altogether different challenge. The England youth international went into the season seeking to continue featuring prominently for the U23s. 

He has achieved that aim but, in an unexpected turn of events, has spent the majority of the season so far playing at centre-back. 

What started as a temporary experient when Krystian Bielik was needed to provide back-up for the first-team has turned into a long-term project, with Sheaf having excelled in his new position. 

The youngster is composed on the ball and can initiate attacks with his varied passing, while he is also an excellent reader of the game and makes precisely timed interceptions with regularity. 

Sheaf has continued to be on the periphery of the first-team, training with the squad and making the bench for the EFL Cup fixtures against Nottingham Forest and Reading. 

The next step for Sheaf, inevitably, is to make his senior debut and that should come next season whether at Arsenal or out on loan.

Thomas Tuchel knew nothing about the Aleksander Isak transfer

A report by Sportbild ran this morning suggesting that Borussia Dortmund head coach Thomas Tuchel knew nothing about Aleksander Isak’s transfer to the club, or until late.

Tuchel was asked about the rumours of Isak to Dortmund prior to their 2-1 win at Werder Bremen on Saturday, of which he walked away. It wasn’t until Isak met with Michael Zorc that Tuchel knew of the transfer.

The publication continues suggesting the relationship between Tuchel and sporting director Michael Zorc & CEO Hans-Joachim Watzke is breaking down.

Tuchel also stated earlier in the week that he wouldn’t comment on his contract situation until the end of the season.

司法機構招募淫褻物品審裁處審裁委員小組成員
司法機構現邀請市民申請成為淫褻物品審裁處審裁委員小組成員。

淫褻及不雅物品的管制

《淫褻及不雅物品管制條例》（香港法例第390章）規管在香港發布（包括派發、傳閱及出售）和公開展示的淫褻及不雅物品，包括印刷品、錄音、影片、錄影帶、紀錄碟和以電子方式發布的刊物(但不包括《電影檢查條例》及《廣播條例》規管的電影和電視)。

根據《淫褻及不雅物品管制條例》，「淫褻」和「不雅」包括暴力、腐化及可厭，而物品分為以下類別：

第I類 : 既非淫褻亦非不雅
第II類 : 不雅
第III類 : 淫褻

第I類物品的發布不受限制。第II類物品不得向十八歲以下人士發布；發布第II類物品時，必須符合若干法例規定，包括以封套把物品密封，並在封面及封底印上警告字句。任何人不得發布第III類物品。

淫褻物品審裁處

根據《淫褻及不雅物品管制條例》而成立的淫褻物品審裁處（下稱審裁處）具備專有審判權，負責裁定物品的類別，即是否淫褻、不雅或既非淫褻亦非不雅。

審裁處在裁定物品是否屬於淫褻或不雅時，須考慮的因素包括一般合理的社會人士普遍接受的道德標準、物品整體上產生的顯著效果、發布的對象、展示物品的地點，以及物品是否具有真正目的。

審裁處由一名主審裁判官及至少兩名審裁委員組成。審裁委員從淫褻物品審裁處審裁委員小組中透過電腦隨機選出。擔任審裁委員的酬金是每天港幣800元。

淫褻物品審裁處審裁委員小組

淫褻物品審裁處審裁委員小組的成員，由終審法院首席法官委任，任期三年，並可再獲委任。凡終審法院首席法官認為符合下列條件的人，即有資格獲委任為審裁委員小組成員：

（一）通常居於香港，居住期不少於七年；及
（二）通曉書面英文或書面中文。

審裁委員小組的成員來自社會各階層，以確保審裁處採納的審裁標準具代表性，並符合社會的道德標準。
